metadata.title: New Flower — Tattoo Artist, Phuket
metadata.description: Premium tattoo art by a professional artist based in Phuket, Thailand. Specialising in fine line, blackwork, botanical illustration, and realism. Book your appointment today.

metadata.title: New Flower Tattoo — Premium Tattoo Art
metadata.description: Fine line, blackwork, and botanical tattoo art by a professional tattoo artist based in Phuket, Thailand. Book your appointment today.

hero.title: Art that lives on skin
hero.subtitle: Specialising in fine line, blackwork, and botanical illustration. Every piece begins with a conversation and ends with something permanent.

aboutPreview.title: Precision meets intention
aboutPreview.paragraph1: With over eight years of dedicated practice, every line is placed with purpose. The studio is a space for collaboration — where your ideas and the artist's craft meet.
aboutPreview.paragraph2: Trained in classical illustration before transitioning to tattooing, the approach is rooted in composition, contrast, and longevity on skin.

metadata.title: Portfolio
metadata.description: Browse the full tattoo portfolio — fine line, blackwork, botanical illustration, realism, neo traditional, and geometric work.

hero.title: Masterpieces
hero.subtitle: A selection of pieces across styles. Each tattoo is custom-designed for the client. No templates, no stock — just original art.

process.title: All original designs
process.description: Every piece shown is a custom design created for a specific client. No flash, no catalogue work.

commissions.title: Similar work welcome
commissions.description: Inspired by something in the portfolio? Describe it in your booking request — a new interpretation can be created.

updates.title: Refreshed regularly
updates.description: New work is added after each completed session. Follow on Instagram for the most current output.

metadata.title: About
metadata.description: Meet the artist behind New Flower Tattoo — eight years of intentional practice rooted in classical illustration.

hero.title: Eight years of intention
hero.subtitle: Tattooing is permanent, so every decision is deliberate — from the weight of a line to where it lives on the body.

bio.title: From illustration to ink
paragraphs: More than eight years of dedicated practice means every line is placed with purpose. The studio is collaborative — your ideas and the artist's craft meeting in the middle.
Before tattooing came classical illustration: botanical drawing, etching, and printmaking. That training guides composition, contrast, and longevity on skin.
Sessions are appointment-only and intentionally unhurried. Consultation, design, and execution happen together to produce work that endures.

items.title: Fine Line
items.description: Delicate, precise linework that ages beautifully. Ideal for botanical motifs, portraits, and geometric patterns.

items.title: Blackwork
items.description: Bold negative space and solid black forms — from minimalist icons to intricate illustrative pieces.

items.title: Botanical Illustration
items.description: Rooted in scientific drawing. Plants, flowers, and organic forms rendered with accuracy and interpretation.

items.title: Realism
items.description: Photorealistic portraits, animals, or objects planned across multiple sessions with meticulous placement.

events.title: First tattoo apprenticeship
events.description: Began a two-year apprenticeship in Saint Petersburg under master tattooist Dmitri Volkov, focusing on traditional techniques and skin theory.

events.title: Moved to fine line specialisation
events.description: Travelled to Berlin to study under contemporary fine-line artists, developing a style rooted in botanical illustration and negative space.

events.title: Opened independent studio
events.description: Established New Flower Studio in Phuket — a private, appointment-only space for focused, collaborative sessions.

events.title: International guest spots
events.description: Residencies in Amsterdam, Copenhagen, and Tokyo brought global perspectives back to Phuket.

events.title: 500+ pieces completed
events.description: Surpassed 500 completed tattoos with work featured in Tattooist Art Magazine and European exhibitions.

location.title: Location
location.description: Private studio in Phuket. The address is shared once a booking is confirmed.

process.title: By appointment only
process.description: No walk-ins. Every session begins with a detailed consultation before any deposit is taken.

standards.title: Safety & hygiene
standards.description: Single-use needles, hospital-grade sterilisation, and full compliance with Thailand health regulations.

cta.title: Start a conversation
cta.subtitle: Describe your idea — even a rough concept is enough to begin. The design process happens in dialogue.

metadata.title: FAQ
metadata.description: Answers to common questions about pricing, deposits, preparation, healing, rescheduling, and what to expect from a tattoo session.

hero.title: Frequently asked
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to know before, during, and after your session. If your question is not answered here, reach out directly.

pricingDetermined.question: How is pricing determined?
pricingDetermined.answer: Pricing is based on size, placement, complexity, and estimated time. Small, simple tattoos typically start from ฿5,000. Large-scale work is quoted per session or as a project total. An accurate quote is provided after the consultation.

consultationFee.question: Do you charge a consultation fee?
consultationFee.answer: No. Initial consultations — whether in person or via message — are free of charge. A deposit is only requested once both parties are happy with the design direction and a session is confirmed.

paymentMethods.question: What forms of payment do you accept?
paymentMethods.answer: Cash, bank transfer, and major card payments are all accepted. The deposit is typically paid via bank transfer to secure the appointment.

depositRequired.question: Is a deposit required to book?
depositRequired.answer: Yes. A non-refundable deposit is required to confirm all appointments. The deposit amount varies by project size but is typically between ฿2,000 and ฿5,000. It is deducted from the final session cost.

depositReschedule.question: What happens to my deposit if I need to reschedule?
depositReschedule.answer: Deposits transfer to a rescheduled appointment if at least 48 hours notice is given. Cancellations with less than 48 hours notice forfeit the deposit.

sessionPrep.question: How should I prepare for my session?
sessionPrep.answer: Arrive well-rested and having eaten a proper meal within two hours of the session. Stay hydrated in the days leading up to your appointment. Avoid alcohol for at least 24 hours beforehand. Wear or bring clothing that allows easy access to the area being tattooed.

moisturise.question: Should I moisturise the area beforehand?
moisturise.answer: Yes — keep the skin well moisturised in the week leading up to your session, but do not apply any lotion on the day of the appointment.

bringGuest.question: Can I bring someone with me?
bringGuest.answer: The studio accommodates one guest per client. For longer sessions it is generally recommended to attend alone to maintain focus and comfort.

healingProcess.question: What is the healing process like?
healingProcess.answer: Most tattoos move through three stages: the initial healing of the surface skin (1–2 weeks), deeper skin healing (2–4 weeks), and full settling of ink into the skin (up to 4 months). Detailed aftercare instructions are provided after every session.

aftercareProducts.question: What aftercare products do you recommend?
aftercareProducts.answer: An unscented, gentle moisturiser is all that is needed after the first few days. Specific product recommendations are shared at the end of each session based on skin type and tattoo placement.

exerciseSwim.question: When can I exercise or swim after getting tattooed?
exerciseSwim.answer: Avoid swimming (pools, the sea, or any submersion) for at least four weeks. Light exercise that does not cause heavy sweating over the tattooed area is generally acceptable after one week.

rescheduleNotice.question: How much notice do I need to reschedule?
rescheduleNotice.answer: At least 48 hours notice is required to reschedule without losing your deposit. To reschedule, send a message via the contact form or directly via Instagram or WhatsApp.

artistCancel.question: What if the artist needs to cancel?
artistCancel.answer: In the unlikely event that a session must be cancelled by the studio, a full refund of the deposit is offered, or the appointment is rescheduled at a time that suits you.

cta.title: Ask directly
cta.subtitle: If something is not covered here, reach out. Every question is welcome — there are no silly ones when it comes to something permanent.

metadata.title: Contact
metadata.description: Get in touch with New Flower Tattoo. Reach out via Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp, or email. Studio located in Phuket, Thailand.

hero.title: Let's talk
hero.subtitle: Every project begins with a conversation. Reach out through any of the channels below — Instagram and Facebook are the quickest.

instagram.description: The fastest way to reach out and see the latest work. DMs are checked daily.

facebook.description: Preferred for detailed project discussions and sharing reference images.

whatsapp.description: For voice or video consultations. Please message first before calling.

email.description: For formal enquiries, press, or collaboration requests. Response within 48 hours.

metadata.title: Book an Appointment
metadata.description: Submit a tattoo appointment request. Describe your idea, preferred dates, and contact method — no deposit required until a design is agreed.

hero.title: Book a session
hero.subtitle: Fill in as much detail as possible — the more context you provide, the better the first consultation will be. No deposit is required until both parties are happy with a direction.

steps.title: Review
steps.body: Your request is reviewed within 48 hours.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.body: A brief conversation — in person, by message, or call — to refine the design.

steps.title: Deposit
steps.body: Once both parties are happy, a deposit is requested to confirm the date.

steps.title: Session
steps.body: The tattoo session takes place. Aftercare instructions provided.

faq.suffix: for answers about pricing, deposits, preparation, and healing.
